description_long: This is a round, textured cup with a single handle on one side and a white, wool-like exterior. The cup is filled with a blue liquid, from which two thick, white plumes of steam or vapor rise vertically, giving the impression of a hot beverage. On one side of the cup, there is a gold-colored decorative motif resembling a stylized animal, possibly a horse or unicorn. The cup's surface appears to have a knitted or woven texture, adding a cozy, handcrafted feel. The interior is smooth and contains the blue liquid, while the handle is integrated into the cup's body. The overall design is whimsical and visually striking, making it stand out in an urban setting.
description: A round, textured cup with a handle, filled with blue liquid and emitting two white plumes of steam, featuring a gold animal motif on its side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle, both steam plumes, and the gold animal motif clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle mostly hidden, one steam plume centered, and the gold motif not visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, both steam plumes visible, and the gold motif partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle on the right, one steam plume centered, and the gold motif mostly visible.
